horoscope: Today's New Moon brings on a new beginning or fresh start, dear Aries, but it’s also about your need to recharge before moving forward. There may be some work to do regarding putting an issue behind you, and you can become aware of the need for more rest and perhaps some seclusion or special attention to your private life. This marks the start of a new cycle of rest and replenishment. You may be reviewing, recharging, and letting go, both spiritually and physically, in the weeks ahead. Circumstances force your attention to your spiritual needs and mental health at this time of year. Today's energy is lively and creative. What comes to light today may take a few days to truly sink in. You're looking at your life differently, especially private, personal, self-worth, and financial matters. You more readily see areas that would benefit from improved approaches, including projects and attitudes. Working under the radar is likely, and it’s useful and fruitful. You want to move forward freer and lighter, and a change of pace feels right.

Today’s New Moon brings a symbolic fresh start, dear Taurus, as well as a strong focus on making contacts and reaching out to others. It’s time to consider your goals for connecting, networking, joining or strengthening ties, and nurturing goodwill. If you’ve been unhappy with particular friends or associations or find something lacking in your social life, you are beginning to feel ready to take charge. A wait-and-see attitude can come in handy right now, but do embrace a sense that changes are necessary for greater fulfillment in the week ahead. A Sun-Uranus aspect influencing today puts you in fine form for hopes and dreams. New ideas and potential ventures inspire you. You might break through a barrier or problem, which comes as a pleasant relief. You’re in excellent shape for coming up with creative and exciting ideas for future projects. You’ll be breaking ground, and you feel less inhibited.

Letting go of attitudes that keep you stuck in the past comes naturally today, dear Gemini. It’s a time to reflect on recent events in your life and dream up long-term or career goals. Today’s New Moon occurs in your career and reputation sector, and career and manifestation are in the spotlight! There can be a pleasant feeling of reinvigoration regarding your life plan goals, as well as subtle changes in your influence or authority, career, status, or reputation. This New Moon helps clear the path for new beginnings. Today's Sun-Uranus transit encourages you to interact with your world a little differently. You might draw upon experience and wisdom to solve a problem likely related to your career or reputation. Instincts for making changes and improvements are excellent, but because it's the day of a New Moon, and Mercury is still retrograde for two more days, it’s best to wait to implement them.

Today's Sun-Uranus aspect can inspire you, dear Cancer, making you more “in tune” with your need for new ideas and experiences. Friends and acquaintances or new plans and dreams can be part of this inspired feeling. Courses, networking, teamwork, and publishing opportunities can be areas of improvement. Friends and alliances formed through your studies or extracurricular activities can be in focus and successful. You especially enjoy sharing viewpoints, personal philosophies, and opinions with others and making exciting discoveries in the process. While a strong day for you on social and mental levels, it's also the day of a New Moon that brings a symbolic fresh start, but requires a couple of days to process. This New Moon focuses on your spirit to grow, explore, and expand beyond ordinary experiences in your life. Events now and in the coming weeks can serve to nudge you out of your routine. You might break from the past in some manner, helping clear the path forward. Aim to draw upon patience before a plan unfolds, but enjoy a pleasant change of pace and building confidence or inspiration that’s in the air now.

You’re inclined to come up with good ideas when you’re not coloring inside the lines with the Sun working in harmony with Uranus today, dear Leo. You might come up with a new method that works wonders for you, or there’s a reputation boost that seems to come out of the blue. The desire for positive change is more potent than usual, and you instinctively know that you have to approach things in new ways to improve. A relationship might play a significant role in your motivation to reach a goal or ambition. Today’s New Moon can motivate you to start fresh with your emotions, dependencies, or attachments. It can be a time for a lifestyle change, or this lunation might inspire you to address issues related to trust that have been undermining your life. In the week ahead, you may resolve a long-standing problem with money or love. Opportunities to pool your resources with a partner or to share the load can emerge. A fresh start is just what you need, and going at problem areas with newfound confidence can make all the difference. Aim to ease in with your fresh start.

Your curiosity and willingness to explore can lead you on fun detours, dear Virgo, and connecting with others who are forward-looking can boost you up. You gravitate to mind-opening experiences or arrive at exciting revelations. While a potential project or plan can be exciting now, a New Moon occurs today, and we're two days behind Mercury ending its retrograde, so it’s best to take things easy. Allow yourself to dream and feel the inspiration build, but it’s better not to push something forward just yet. This New Moon points to a symbolic fresh start, however, and changes are in the works! Issues of sharing, balancing, harmonizing, and partnership come to the fore. You’re gearing up to take charge, ready to move in a new direction or towards a new, enlightened perspective. This lunation can reinforce and stir recent feelings about a person, relationship, or partnership needs. You might come to meaningful conclusions about your relationship needs.

There can be exciting revelations about your buried desires or needs today, dear Libra. Approaching things just a little differently comes naturally now, particularly with work, finances, and emotions. As we are two days away from Mercury's direct turn, and due to a New Moon today, be sure not to overdo or push a matter. However, do aim to enjoy the positive vibes that could very well lead to small breakthroughs in your work or intimate life. You have a positive attitude and focus, even if you’re tying up loose ends and taking things easy for now. Today's New Moon brings take-charge, forward-looking energy to your work, services, health, and habits, setting the stage for new beginnings or a fresh approach in any of these areas. You can be highly motivated to launch new work projects and personal health or fitness programs in the week ahead. The desire to take better care of yourself or to do your personal best comes on strong. Organizing and improving your daily routines can be satisfying. You might breathe new life into old routines or approach your everyday affairs in a new, more inspired manner. Instead, new priorities and tasks to manage can take center stage.

Today's influences are strong for dreaming up new ideas and turning on to different interests, dear Scorpio. Be patient about putting exciting new plans into action, but fresh approaches to relating are in order as you advance. You’re expressing yourself more freely and playfully, and this may very well open up a door of opportunity. Some areas of your life need space for exploration – breaking free from some rules or expectations can help improve them. This is particularly evident with hobbies, leisure, children, love, romance, and partnership. Today's New Moon, in fact, sparks your creative juices and can highlight romantic inclinations. It brings out your need to celebrate, enjoy yourself, or express yourself. It can be a passionate time for you, and events around now can motivate you to start or restart a project, hobby, or your dating/leisure life. A boost of energy can jumpstart joyful activities or experiences. Quality entertainment and channels for expressing yourself might open up for you in the week ahead. Ideas for enjoying life’s more playful moments can come to you now.

A new or different approach to your usual routines can refresh you now, dear Sagittarius. In fact, a brief or small departure from the rules may lead to interesting new ideas or experiences. Follow your intuition when doing your work and domestic activities, and as you approach others with an open mind, they respond by opening theirs. While it’s a forward-looking day, it’s important not to invest too much of yourself or your resources into a new venture until you've processed things. A New Moon occurs today, pointing to new directions. Ideas can be in the hatching stage and entirely worth your attention. This New Moon brings fresh energy into your life for personal and domestic pursuits. You might consider this a strong prompt to reconnect with yourself, as it can be a great time to check in with your feelings and comfort levels before pressing forward. A new start with family, home life, or living conditions and arrangements is in the pipeline. This New Moon highlights the need to pay special attention to your home base or personal life. Living arrangements and conditions might be overdue for a change, and it's soon time to work some magic.

Today’s transits are interesting because they encourage a forward-looking spirit, dear Capricorn, but you’re better off taking things easy and not pushing forward. We have two more days of Mercury's retrograde, and there's a New Moon today, and while it's fresh, it's a good idea to process and connect with your intuition. Still, your mind is open to new ways of connecting, and you have a strong sense of progress and gratitude. You appreciate the chance to experiment and express your more unique traits now. You're motivated to approach your daily tasks in new ways, and you’re in line for a new beginning related to personal interests, studies, connecting, learning, or commuting. This lunation can also mark the start of a brand new attitude or mindset that helps you connect more effectively with the world around you. Improving your communication skills or taking bigger risks with learning and communicating may be in focus. You'll be making valuable, happy connections and contacts and developing exciting new ideas in the week ahead. You might begin a new course or writing project or make a new friend, for example. For now, it’s a great time to think about your goals and resolutions in these areas. Aim to be open to the idea that you need more intellectual stimulation in your life.

Innovative approaches to your money or personal life can come naturally to you today, dear Aquarius. There could be a pleasant surprise along financial, home, or business lines. You might discover a new method or come up with a fabulous idea that frees you from a problem or heavy feeling. Insight into a practical matter, primarily financial, can come when you’re not trying too hard. Taking a small step back from a problem may bring a natural solution, gently. Today's New Moon sets the stage for new beginnings in the week ahead. It’s a good time for money-making ideas or new and improved ways to handle your money, valuables, and possessions. It’s also an excellent time to plan and organize your practical affairs. Today, you might make some resolutions related to business, finances, and boosting your sense of security. If you’re looking to earn more, you might feel motivated to seek new channels as you advance. Aim to receive and enjoy new ideas and sort them out patiently as you go along. This can be the start of something exceptional!

Today’s energies encourage an optimistic approach to the day, dear Pisces. The Sun in your sign harmonizes with Uranus, boosting your appeal through your communications and ideas. It’s particularly helpful since it helps you detach just enough to see which elements of your life are dragging you down. Letting go of a problem can figure strongly now, and it comes at an ideal time, just before you get a fresh start, and a new cycle begins. People appreciate you more than usual. It can be a time for shaking up the usual routine. The New Moon also occurs in your sign today, pointing to a personal new beginning or a sense that you have a new lease on life. You feel more empowered to make changes and steer your life in the direction you want in the coming days. Certainly, you’re more noticeable and “out there,” and it’s a good time to ride this energy well. You might change the way you greet the world if this can benefit you. You are more dynamic than usual, and reshaping your image if it needs tweaking can be in focus. Ease yourself into this dynamic phase of your life for the best results.
